front.title: A Protocol for Periodic On-path Explicit Measurement

abstract.t: This document defines the Periodic On-path Explicit Measurement (POEM) protocol, which enables passive on-path measurement of packet loss for QUIC flows. POEM uses periodic marker packets, coalesced with ordinary QUIC packets, that allow on-path network elements to measure upstream packet loss by counting packets between markers. Marker packets also carry a sender-reported loss count, enabling observers to distinguish upstream from downstream loss. Additionally, POEM defines a report mechanism through which network elements communicate measurement results back to endpoints.
